meta.title: DEF CON 29 Adversary Village - Samuel Kimmons -  Intro to Adversary Emulation
meta.description: Adversary Emulation is quickly becoming a hot topic in information security, and there is a good reason for it. Security analysts, threat hunters, and incident responders are constantly facing an onslaught of old and new threats. How can defenders properly prepare for the ever-changing threat landscape, improve their skill set, and improve the security posture of their organization? In this presentation I'll answer those questions by covering: The various forms of Adversary Emulation, where/how it fits into Security Operations, Threat Intelligence, the benefits of using it as a Blue Team training tool, and how to get started!
